metadata.estimated_surtax_worksheet_formula: Add column A of worksheet lines 1 through 2c, subtract the $1,107,750 surtax threshold, and multiply worksheet line 3 by 4%.
metadata.five_percent_income_categories: Wages, salaries, tips, business income, partnership and S corporation income, trust income, rental income, unemployment compensation, taxable alimony, pensions and annuity income, IRA/Keogh distributions, winnings, fees, long-term capital gain income not taxed at 8.5% or 12%, interest and dividend income, and other taxable income not taxed at 8.5% or 12%.
metadata.source_note: Official tax-year-2026 Form 1-ES estimated-tax instructions and worksheet. Page 3 assigns a 5% rate to the listed ordinary-income categories and computes estimated 4% surtax by adding worksheet column A lines 1 through 2c, subtracting the $1,107,750 threshold, and multiplying line 3 by 4%. This form scope supports estimated-tax calculations only and does not certify final tax-year-2026 Form 1 or Form 1-NR/PY liability.
metadata.title: 2026 Form 1-ES Massachusetts Estimated Income Tax
